Grappling Hook took you in about a year ago..

User is part of the Redcliff Wranglers! This bot is a bit token heavy, so I don't really recommend Janitor LLM. Also very open so you can have cute scenarios with them all! Minor info on the scorch + Worldbuilding!!

Woahh third Wrangler bot! I'm running out of pfps.. there's only so many with them all in frame 😞 Oh boy I do love writing about these guys!! I get to stare at their panels all day hehe.. Did you guys know I'm obsessed with art deco and the gilded age? I loovee designing stuff with art deco. I have a whole phighting au where slingshot's cafe aka Thieves' Rest is actually a speak easy and the church keeps trying to get shuriken into the mafia. I have no idea why I'm ranting about this I just need to info dump okk?? Bye
